title: Bhimeshvara Temple, Nilagunda
tagline: Bhimeshvara Temple, Nilagunda — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Bhimeshvara temple (also spelt Bhimesvara or Bhimeshwara) is a temple in the town of Nilagunda (also spelt Neelagunda) in the Davangere district of Karnataka state, India.

topPlaces.name: Neelagunda, Harapanahalli
topPlaces.description: Neelagunda is a historical village 12 km away from Harapanahalli city, and in the Harapanahalli Taluk of Vijayanagara district in Karnataka state, India.

topPlaces.name: Teligi, India
topPlaces.description: Teligi is a village in the Kalyana Karnataka region of northeastern part of state Karnataka, which connects kalyana karnataka with middle karnataka away from 20 km both Harapanahalli and Harihara in India. It is located in the Harapanahalli taluk of Vijayanagara District.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhimeshvara Temple, Nilagunda?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhimeshvara Temple, Nilagunda is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhimeshvara Temple, Nilagunda?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (111 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (105 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhimeshvara Temple, Nilagunda?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhimeshvara Temple, Nilagunda at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhimeshvara Temple, Nilagunda?
faq.a: Stays in Bhimeshvara Temple, Nilagunda start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhimeshvara Temple, Nilagunda?
faq.a: The top attractions are Neelagunda, Harapanahalli, Teligi, India.
